languages.text: Upon destruction, the obelisk deals 35-60 Shock damage (armor pen 100) to all units around it and pushes them for 2 cells. On a failed TOU Save (-30), the affected creatures are Prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Upon destruction, the obelisk deals 35-60 Shock damage (armor pen 100) to all units around it and pushes them for 2 cells. On a failed TOU Save (-30), the affected creatures are Prone for 1 round.

languages.text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.
languages.original_text: Upon destruction, the obelisk deals 35-60 Shock damage (armor pen 100) to all units around it and pushes them for 2 cells. On a failed TOU Save (-30), the affected creatures are Prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 shock damage with 100% armour penetration to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

languages.text: При уничтожении обелиск наносит от 35 до 60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки и отталкивает их на 2 клетки. Каждое из них совершает проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −30 и в случае провала оказывается опрокинуто на 1 раунд.

All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: При уничтожении обелиск наносит 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки.

Каждое из них совершает проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −30 и в случае провала оказывается опрокинуто на 1 раунд.

При уничтожении обелиск наносит от 35 до 60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки и отталкивает их на 2 клетки. Каждое из них совершает проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −30 и в случае провала оказывается опрокинуто на 1 раунд.

languages.text: Wird der Obelisk zerstört, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 1 Feld 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 100 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text: Wird der Obelisk zerstört, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 1 Feld 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 100 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu.

languages.text: Cuando el obelisco se destruye, inflige 35-60 de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas en un radio de 1 casilla a su alrededor. within a 1-cell radius around it.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text: Cuando el obelisco se destruye, inflige 35-60 de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas en un radio de 1 casilla a su alrededor. within a 1-cell radius around it.

languages.text: Dikili taş, imha olduğunda etrafındaki 1 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklara %100 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text: Dikili taş, imha olduğunda etrafındaki 1 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklara %100 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir.

languages.text: 方尖碑被摧毁时，对周围1格范围内的所有生物造成附带100%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的35至60点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text: 方尖碑被摧毁时，对周围1格范围内的所有生物造成附带100%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的35至60点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。

languages.text: À sa destruction, l'obélisque inflige 35-60 points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 1 case autour de lui.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text: À sa destruction, l'obélisque inflige 35-60 points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 1 case autour de lui.

languages.text: オベリスクが破壊されると、周囲1マス以内のすべての生き物に35-60の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与え、100%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}率で、2マス押し上げます。すべての影響を受けた生き物は-30のペナルティを付与した{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}タフネス{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}耐性試験{/g}に合格しなければ、1ラウンド間伏せてしまいます。
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: オベリスクが破壊されると、周囲1マス以内のすべての生き物に35-60の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与え、100%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}率で、2マス押し上げます。すべての影響を受けた生き物は-30のペナルティを付与した{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}タフネス{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}耐性試験{/g}に合格しなければ、1ラウンド間伏せてしまいます。
